pi_items.source: task.json task description (line 5 mentions 'Change the Site Title to Artisan Crafts Studio'). This is a valid string value for WordPress blogname option.
task.json task description (line 5 mentions 'Change the Tagline to Handcrafted with Love'). This is a valid string value for WordPress blogdescription option.

Verified as valid IANA timezone via Python pytz library. Confirmed in task description (line 5: 'Set the Timezone to New York (America/New_York)'). America/New_York is the standard IANA identifier for Eastern Time US.
task.json task description (line 6 mentions 'create two new pages: one titled Home'). WordPress wp_posts table stores this as post_title field.
task.json task description (line 6 mentions 'one titled News'). WordPress wp_posts table stores this as post_title field.

Verified as valid WordPress show_on_front option value via web search of WordPress documentation. Valid values are 'posts' (default) or 'page' (for static homepage). Task description (line 8) says 'Set Your homepage displays to A static page', which corresponds to show_on_front='page'.

privileged_info_summary: Task requires configuring WooCommerce store identity settings in WordPress. All metadata claims are valid: Site title will be set to 'Artisan Crafts Studio', tagline to 'Handcrafted with Love', timezone to 'America/New_York' (valid IANA timezone), and two pages titled 'Home' and 'News' will be created and published. The reading settings will be configured to show a static front page (show_on_front='page', a valid WordPress option value) with 'Home' as homepage and 'News' as posts page.
